summary: Frontend-only validation completed for inline canvas editing and save/reopen persistence on public preview URL.

console_issues.issue: React console warnings: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop (observed on builder load and after page switch).

action_items: Add stable key props for inline-rendered mapped children inside SectionRenderer (and any related mapped child groups) to remove React key warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Inline editing, save, and reopen flows function correctly; however, list rendering currently emits React key warnings which should be fixed to avoid reconciliation risks and noisy logs.
seed_data_creation: Created test project: Inline QA 713530 via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Tested hero title, nav item, CTA label, contact email, FAQ question inline edits; saved via Save button; reopened project and confirmed persistence across Home + Contact pages. Builder controls (page switch, viewport toggle, save) remained functional.
rca of the issue: React warning root cause appears to be mapped inline-editable elements returned without explicit key in SectionRenderer maps (e.g., nav items / list items paths where helper render functions are directly returned).
